items.title: Encryption, spyware, and now Mythos: History shows why cyber export control doesn’t work
items.description: For the last 30 years, stopping the flow of cybersecurity-related software has proven to be ineffective. It's unclear why it would work now with Anthropic’s cybersecurity model Mythos.
items.title_original: Encryption, spyware, and now Mythos: History shows why cyber export control doesn’t work
items.title_en: Encryption, spyware, and now Mythos: History shows why cyber export control doesn’t work
items.title_zh: 加密、间谍软件和现在的神话：历史表明为什么网络出口管制不起作用
items.title_bilingual: 加密、间谍软件和现在的神话：历史表明为什么网络出口管制不起作用 / Encryption, spyware, and now Mythos: History shows why cyber export control doesn’t work
items.title_clean: 网络安全软件出口管制无效性分析：以Anthropic的Mythos模型为例
items.summary: 文章分析了过去30年网络安全软件出口管制措施的实际效果，指出这些措施未能有效阻止相关软件的流动。文章质疑为何现在对Anthropic的网络安全模型Mythos实施出口管制会取得不同效果，为产品经理提供了关于技术管制局限性的参考视角。

items.title: Aspen Disruption Triggers South Africa Contraceptive Shortage
items.description: A disruption at Aspen Pharmacare Holdings Ltd.’s manufacturing facilities has led to shortages of oral contraceptives across South Africa, according to the health department and a local pharmacy chain

items.title_en: Aspen Disruption Triggers South Africa Contraceptive Shortage

items.summary: 南非Aspen Pharmacare制药厂生产中断，导致全国范围内口服避孕药供应短缺，这反映了药品供应链脆弱性，对AI助手在健康提醒、药品信息查询等场景开发有参考价值。

items.title: AutoForm’s Debt Rejig Highlights Revived Appetite for Software
items.description: Investors in European collateralized loan obligations piled into AutoForm’s latest deal, the first test of demand for junk-debt borrowers in the software sector since a selloff earlier this year.

items.title_clean: AutoForm债务重组：投资者对软件行业垃圾债券需求回升
items.summary: 欧洲担保贷款投资者积极认购AutoForm的最新债务重组交易，这是今年早些时候软件行业抛售后，市场首次测试对垃圾债务借款人的需求，显示投资者对软件行业风险偏好的变化。

items.title: Scatec Says Egypt Solar Project Can Save $400 Million Over LNG
items.description: Scatec ASA’s Obelisk solar and battery storage project in Egypt can save the country as much as $400 million a year in liquefied natural gas imports, according to Chief Executive Officer Terje Pilskog

items.title_en: Scatec Says Egypt Solar Project Can Save $400 Million Over LNG

items.title_clean: Scatec：埃及太阳能项目可节省4亿美元液化天然气进口成本
items.summary: Scatec公司在埃及的方尖碑太阳能与电池储能项目每年可为该国节省高达4亿美元的液化天然气进口费用。该项目展示了大规模可再生能源替代传统能源的经济效益，对AI助手产品经理评估能源服务场景和商业化价值有参考意义。

items.title: UK Fintech Starling Shrinks Board as McPike Cements Control
items.description: Starling Bank Ltd. is streamlining its board in light of a number of departures, a move that increases the sway of UK digital bank’s largest shareholder.

items.title: Fujikura Shares Surge 16% as Outlook Hike Calms Market Jitters
items.description: Japanese fiber-optic cablemaker Fujikura Ltd.’s shares gained 16% to their daily limit after the firm unexpectedly raised its profit guidance above market estimates.
